page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. This instance features 8 dedicated virtual CPUs with 8 physical cores operating at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 35 MB of L3 cache, supporting advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512F, AVX-512_VNNI, AES, BMI2, ADX, and FMA.

Performance benchmarks place this instance consistently in the average tier across most standard workloads. It achieves a stress-ng single-core CPU performance score of 1434.29 and a multi-core score of 7647.48. Memory bandwidth tests show 427.07 GB/sec for small cached blocks, dropping to 49.41 GB/sec for large uncached read operations and 37.03 GB/sec for large write operations. In database operations, the instance handles 7.45 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 2977.09 in PassMark database benchmarks.

The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. While it handles lightweight LLM inference tasks reasonably well, processing 515.08 tokens per second for a small 135M model, performance drops significantly on larger models, yielding 11.53 tokens per second for a medium 7B model. This hardware profile is best suited for general-purpose workloads, static web serving, software compilation, and moderate database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs running at 3.1 GHz and 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark results position the instance in the average tier, with a Geekbench single-core score of 1247.0 and a multi-core score of 4810.0. It delivers 7.45 million operations per second in Redis SET tests and 6.99 GB/sec in static web serving throughput. Network performance is constrained to a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps. This instance is suitable for general-purpose applications, software compilation, static web serving, and moderate database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.2xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 3.1 GHz, 32 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, suitable for moderate database and web serving workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.2xlarge is a general-purpose server with 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline.
tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute instance with balanced memory allocation and consistent mid-range performance for general-purpose workloads.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
